name: Sweet Potato and Pecan Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cooked, sliced sweet potatoes in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, salt and cinnamon. Stir in apricot nectar, hot water and orange peel. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly for two minutes. Remove from heat; stir in margarine and pecans.
3. Pour the mixture over the sweet potatoes.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes.
